SESCDAffectedSurfaceMention.description: Span-augmented SES-CD affected surface finding for a single segment.

has_mention.description: Indicates whether the concept was mentioned in the text (false by default).
has_mention.title: Has Mention

spans.description: The verbatim text where this concept was mentioned.
spans.title: Spans

value.description: SES-CD affected surface descriptor (any disease involvement, ulcerated or not). UNAFFECTED_SEGMENT: no affected surface in the segment. PCT_LT_50: less than 50% of the segment surface is affected. PCT_50_TO_75: 50% to 75% of the segment surface is affected. PCT_GT_75: more than 75% of the segment surface is affected.

SESCDAffectedSurfaceMention.title: SESCDAffectedSurfaceMention

SESCDNarrowingMention.description: Span-augmented SES-CD narrowing finding for a single segment.

has_mention.description: Indicates whether the concept was mentioned in the text (false by default).
has_mention.title: Has Mention

spans.description: The verbatim text where this concept was mentioned.
spans.title: Spans

value.description: SES-CD narrowing descriptor. Per Daperno 2004, score the most severe narrowing in the segment. NONE: no narrowing present. SINGLE_PASSABLE: one narrowing is present and can be passed. MULTIPLE_PASSABLE: multiple narrowings are present and can be passed. CANNOT_BE_PASSED: a narrowing is present that cannot be passed. NONE_OF_THE_ABOVE: none of the above.

SESCDNarrowingMention.title: SESCDNarrowingMention

SESCDSegmentFindings.description:
SES-CD findings for a single bowel segment, reconstructed from the
descriptive endoscopic narrative. The parent SESCDMention identifies
which anatomic segment this corresponds to; segment_name is also
carried here so that a flattened/serialized segment record remains
self-describing.

segment.description: Anatomic name of the bowel segment this mention describes.

ulcer_size.description: Ulcer size finding for this segment.

ulcerated_surface.description: Ulcerated surface finding for this segment.

affected_surface.description: Affected surface finding for this segment.

SESCDSegmentFindings.title: SESCDSegmentFindings

SESCDSegmentFindingsAnnotation.description:
SES-CD reconstructed from the descriptive findings of an endoscopy
report across the five standard bowel segments. Use this when the
endoscopist did NOT plainly write a computed SES-CD score; for the
plainly-written case, use ReportedSESCDMention.

ileum.description: SES-CD findings for the ileum segment.

right_colon.description: SES-CD findings for the right colon segment.

transverse_colon.description: SES-CD findings for the transverse colon segment.

left_colon.description: SES-CD findings for the left colon segment.

rectum.description: SES-CD findings for the rectum segment.

SESCDSegmentFindingsAnnotation.title: SESCDSegmentFindingsAnnotation

SESCDSegmentMention.description:
SES-CD findings for a single bowel segment, reconstructed from the
descriptive endoscopic narrative. The parent SESCDMention identifies
which anatomic segment this corresponds to; segment_name is also
carried here so that a flattened/serialized segment record remains
self-describing.

has_mention.description: Indicates whether the concept was mentioned in the text (false by default).
has_mention.title: Has Mention

spans.description: The verbatim text where this concept was mentioned.
spans.title: Spans

segment_name.description: Anatomic name of the bowel segment this mention describes.

segment_status.description: Whether this bowel segment was assessable for SES-CD. EXAMINED: segment was examined endoscopically. RESECTED: segment has been surgically resected. NOT_EXPLORED: segment was not explored during this exam (e.g., terminal ileum not intubated). NONE_OF_THE_ABOVE: none of the above.

SESCDSegmentMention.title: SESCDSegmentMention

SESCDSegmentName.description:
Anatomic name of the bowel segment scored. Included on each
SESCDSegmentMention so that a serialized segment is self-describing
even when flattened out of its parent SESCDMention context.
SESCDSegmentName.title: SESCDSegmentName

SESCDSegmentStatus.description: Whether the bowel segment was available for SES-CD assessment.
SESCDSegmentStatus.title: SESCDSegmentStatus

SESCDSegmentSubscoreAnnotation.description:
Per-segment SES-CD subscores as explicitly stated in the report.
Only populated when the endoscopist writes out the segment-level
number (e.g., "ileum subscore 4"); do not infer from descriptive
findings.

ileum.description: Reported SES-CD subscore for the ileum, if explicitly stated.

right_colon.description: Reported SES-CD subscore for the right colon, if explicitly stated.

transverse_colon.description: Reported SES-CD subscore for the transverse colon, if explicitly stated.

left_colon.description: Reported SES-CD subscore for the left colon, if explicitly stated.

rectum.description: Reported SES-CD subscore for the rectum, if explicitly stated.

SESCDSegmentSubscoreAnnotation.title: SESCDSegmentSubscoreAnnotation

SESCDSegmentSubscoreMention.description:
Per-segment SES-CD subscores as explicitly stated in the report.
Only populated when the endoscopist writes out the segment-level
number (e.g., "ileum subscore 4"); do not infer from descriptive
findings.

has_mention.description: Indicates whether the concept was mentioned in the text (false by default).
has_mention.title: Has Mention

spans.description: The verbatim text where this concept was mentioned.
spans.title: Spans

segment_name.description: Anatomic name of the bowel segment this mention describes.

score.description: Reported SES-CD subscore, if explicitly stated.
score.title: Score

SESCDSegmentSubscoreMention.title: SESCDSegmentSubscoreMention

SESCDUlcerSizeMention.description: Span-augmented SES-CD ulcer size finding for a single segment.

has_mention.description: Indicates whether the concept was mentioned in the text (false by default).
has_mention.title: Has Mention

spans.description: The verbatim text where this concept was mentioned.
spans.title: Spans

value.description: SES-CD ulcer size descriptor. NONE: no ulcers seen. APHTHOUS: aphthous ulcers measuring 0.1 to 0.5 cm. LARGE: ulcers measuring 0.5 to 2 cm. VERY_LARGE: ulcers larger than 2 cm.

SESCDUlcerSizeMention.title: SESCDUlcerSizeMention

SESCDUlceratedSurfaceMention.description: Span-augmented SES-CD ulcerated surface finding for a single segment.

has_mention.description: Indicates whether the concept was mentioned in the text (false by default).
has_mention.title: Has Mention

spans.description: The verbatim text where this concept was mentioned.
spans.title: Spans

value.description: SES-CD ulcerated surface descriptor. Should be NONE whenever ulcer size is NONE. NONE: no ulcerated surface. PCT_LT_10: less than 10% of the segment surface is ulcerated. PCT_10_TO_30: 10% to 30% of the segment surface is ulcerated. GT_30_PERCENT: more than 30% of the segment surface is ulcerated.

SESCDUlceratedSurfaceMention.title: SESCDUlceratedSurfaceMention

description:
Captures an SES-CD score plainly written in the endoscopy report
(e.g., "SES-CD = 7", "Simple Endoscopic Score for Crohn's Disease: 12").

This is distinct from SESCDMention, which reconstructs SES-CD from the
descriptive narrative. Use this class when the endoscopist has already
computed and documented the score, and use SESCDMention when the score
must be derived from descriptions of ulcers, surfaces, and narrowings.

total_score.description: The total SES-CD score as explicitly stated in the report. SES-CD totals range from 0 to 60 (five segments, each contributing 0-12). Leave as None if no total is plainly written.
total_score.title: Total Score

title: IbdSESCDAnnotation
